# Rork Lab — Rork Max Knowledge Base

> Rork Lab is a comprehensive knowledge base for Rork Max, the AI-powered mobile app builder. Covers beginner to advanced topics in Japanese and English.

## About

Rork Lab provides tutorials, guides, and reference articles about Rork Max and no-code app development. The site covers:

- Rork Basics: Getting started, core features, and UI essentials
- Developer Tools Integration: External tool connections, APIs, and webhooks
- AI Integration: ChatGPT, Claude, and other LLM integrations
- Business & Deployment: App Store publishing, analytics, and monetization

## Content Categories

- [Rork Basics Articles](https://rorklab.net/articles/rork-basics)
- [Developer Tools Articles](https://rorklab.net/articles/rork-dev)
- [AI Integration Articles](https://rorklab.net/articles/rork-ai)
- [Business & Deployment Articles](https://rorklab.net/articles/rork-business)
- [Guides](https://rorklab.net/guides)
- [Blog](https://rorklab.net/blog)

## Languages

- Japanese (Primary): https://rorklab.net/
- English: https://rorklab.net/en/

## Key Topics

Rork Max, no-code, low-code, mobile app builder, iOS, Android, AI-powered development, ChatGPT integration, Claude integration, App Store publishing, app development, visual programming

## Author

Masaki Hirokawa (https://dolice.net)

For a complete listing of all articles with URLs, see: https://rorklab.net/llms-full.txt
